summary: Hiring 5 React developers for a Bengaluru product team with strong front-end ownership and collaboration skills.
jobDescription: We are hiring React developers to build and improve product experiences for a fast-moving Bengaluru team. You will work closely with design, product, and backend teams to ship reliable user-facing features, improve performance, and maintain a thoughtful engineering bar across the frontend stack.
roleDetails: Own implementation of user-facing product features in React.
Collaborate closely with product and design on delivery scope.

screeningQuestions.label: Availability
screeningQuestions.question: How soon can you join if selected?
screeningQuestions.note: Helps the recruiter understand start-date flexibility.

screeningQuestions.label: Location
screeningQuestions.question: Are you comfortable working in a hybrid setup from Bengaluru?

screeningQuestions.label: Salary
screeningQuestions.question: What is your current and expected annual compensation?

evaluationContext: Prioritize candidates who have shipped real customer-facing interfaces in React, can explain collaboration with product and design, and demonstrate strong ownership over quality, performance, and frontend architecture decisions.
candidateCriteria: Can explain complex UI decisions clearly.
publishNotes: Publish only after the basics, description, and screening questions feel recruiter-ready.
